name: WESCO International Inc. Depositary Shares each representing 1/1000th interest in a share of Series A Fixed-Rate Reset Cumulative Perpetual Preferred Stock
summary: WESCO International Inc. Depositary Shares each representing 1/1000th interest in a share of Series A Fixed-Rate Reset Cumulative Perpetual Preferred Stock represents fractional ownership in preferred stock issued by WESCO International Inc. The depositary shares offer a fixed dividend rate and rank senior to common stock in liquidation. The nature of the company is a distributor of electrical, industrial, and communications MRO and OEM products.
